articles.title: Man stabs social media influencer wife to death, then attacks himself
articles.description: A shocking incident unfolded in Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, where a 45-year-old social media influencer and beautician, Nisha Chauhan, was allegedly murdered by her husband, Pradeep. The brutal attack reportedly stemmed from a property dispute. The accused then allegedly attempted suicide and is currently hospitalized. Their teenage child sustained minor injuries intervening in the altercation.

articles.title: 'Forced acid down his throat': Parents kill jobless son over repeated drunken brawls
articles.description: A shocking incident has emerged from Rajkot where a young man was allegedly murdered by his parents. Authorities arrested the couple after a forensic postmortem revealed strangulation marks, contradicting the family's claim of suicide by acid consumption. The victim's wife filed a complaint detailing the alleged brutal act by his mother and father following an argument.

articles.title: 'We knew this would be very tough': Messi admits Cabo Verde pushed Argentina to the limit
articles.description: Defending champions Argentina narrowly escaped a major upset, defeating debutants Cabo Verde 3-2 in extra time to advance to the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16. Lionel Messi opened the scoring, but Cabo Verde fought back twice. An own goal ultimately sealed Argentina's victory, with Messi acknowledging the tough challenge and praising his opponents' spirited performance. The win keeps Argentina on track, with Messi extending his scoring record.

articles.title: 'Fake news': Israel denies report it planned to assassinate Iranian negotiators
articles.description: Israel has vehemently denied reports suggesting it planned to assassinate senior Iranian negotiators during diplomatic talks, labeling the claims "fake news." The New York Times report alleged US officials warned Iran of potential Israeli targeting of key figures like Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, fearing it would derail peace efforts. Meanwhile, Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and US President Trump have agreed to a future meeting.

articles.title: 7 rescued as boat capsizes on Wisconsin lake; 3 children dead
articles.description: A devastating storm on Geneva Lake, Wisconsin, led to a tragic boat capsizing, claiming three young lives and requiring the rescue of seven others. Powerful winds and rough waves overwhelmed the vessel carrying ten people, including children. The severe weather also caused widespread damage, power outages, and disrupted holiday weekend plans across the region.

articles.title: AI boom lifts industrial engineers' pay packages
articles.description: India's burgeoning AI data-centre sector is creating a surge in demand for mechanical, electrical, and industrial engineers. These professionals, once overlooked, are now commanding significant salaries as companies build energy-intensive AI infrastructure. Roles like cooling specialists and power procurement heads are in high demand, driving a new career path for talent in physical infrastructure development.

articles.title: HCLTech wins $1.1bn AI-led deal with Mercedes
articles.description: HCLTech's stock surged almost 6% following the announcement of a massive $1.1 billion deal with a European Fortune Global 50 company, widely believed to be Mercedes-Benz. This significant AI-led agreement, set to run for five years with an extension option, will see HCLTech revamp the automaker's global digital workplace and network operations. The deal highlights the increasing enterprise focus on artificial intelligence investments.

articles.title: Identify imported goods for manufacturing: Piyush Goyal tells states
articles.description: Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal has called on states to identify import-substitutable products, aiming to boost domestic manufacturing, cut foreign exchange outgo, and strengthen supply chains. He also pushed for export committees and monthly reviews to support industries facing unfair trade practices. A 90-day drive will focus on 120 districts to increase exporter registrations and export value, aligning with the One District One Product initiative.

articles.title: SAP tightens hiring, travel as investments in AI zoom
articles.description: German software giant SAP is implementing hiring freezes, travel restrictions, and tighter control over external spending to fuel its significant investments in artificial intelligence. The company is prioritizing core AI roles and strategic acquisitions to bolster its AI capabilities. While internal travel is paused, essential trips for AI initiatives and customer engagement will continue, reflecting SAP's commitment to its AI-driven future.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: Goa Institute of Management hosts Delhi University principals for leadership programme on higher education
articles.description: The Goa Institute of Management (GIM) concluded a five-day Academic Leadership Programme for principals of over 40 Delhi University colleges to discuss the future of higher education. The programme focused on institutional leadership, AI in education, NEP 2020, governance, digital transformation and learner-centred approaches. Academic leaders also deliberated on key challenges such as declining admissions, student employability, classroom attendance and infrastructure funding while sharing strategies to strengthen higher education institutions.
articles.full_text: Sanjay Sharma is a seasoned journalist with over two decades of experience in the media industry. articles.title: JNCU declares final semester undergraduate and postgraduate results at jncu.in; download here
articles.description: The Jananayak Chandrashekhar University has declared final semester undergraduate and postgraduate results online for multiple programmes including NEP courses. Students can download provisional marksheets using roll numbers from the official portal. Results include MSc Agriculture, MA, BCA, BSc, BCom, and other professional courses across arts, science, commerce, and agriculture streams. Links were released in phases and correction options are available for errors in student details. The official website provides separate links for all result categories, ensuring smooth access and easy downloading for thousands of students.

articles.title: SSB HC ministerial admit card 2026 out for CBT exam on 7 July; download hall ticket here
articles.description: SSB HC Ministerial 2020 admit card 2026 has been released by Sashastra Seema Bal for Computer Based Test scheduled on 07 July 2026. Candidates can download hall ticket from official recruitment portal using login credentials. Admit card contains exam centre, timing and instructions. Recruitment covers 115 posts with selection through PET, PST, CBT, skill test, document verification and medical examination. Candidates must carry printed admit card and valid ID proof to the exam centre, failing which entry will not be permitted as per examination guidelines issued by the authorities.

articles.title: WUD launches new theatre programmes for creative careers in India
articles.description: The World University of Design (WUD) has introduced two theatre programmes in India for the 2026–27 academic session, including a four-year Bachelor of Performing Arts (Honours) in Theatre and a two-year Master of Performing Arts in Theatre. The courses are designed to prepare students for careers in theatre, film, television, OTT platforms and digital media. The curriculum combines performance training, interdisciplinary learning and practical exposure aligned with India’s expanding creative economy and industry needs.

articles.title: Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce officially MARRIED!
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have tied the knot in a grand ceremony, with "JusT&T Married" flashing across Madison Square Garden screens, igniting fan celebrations. The couple exchanged vows surrounded by over 1000 guests, including family, friends, and a host of celebrities. This joyous union has sent waves of excitement through their fanbase, both online and at the venue.

articles.title: 'Srinivasa Mangapuram' release date out
articles.description: Mark your calendars for July 30, 2026, as 'Srinivasa Mangapuram' promises an exhilarating mix of romance and action! Debuting Jaya Krishna Ghattamaneni, the nephew of Mahesh Babu, alongside the enchanting Rasha Thadani from Bollywood, the film unfolds in the picturesque Tirupati. Following a couple's tumultuous love story, Mohan Babu emerges as the menacing villain. Expect breathtaking visuals and powerful performances showcased in the latest teaser.

articles.title: 'Spider-Man' to beat 'The Odyssey' with USD 228 mn opening
articles.description: Tom Holland's 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' is poised for a massive box office debut, projecting a staggering USD 228 million opening weekend in North America. The film has already shattered Fandango's 2026 first-day presale records, surpassing even Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey'. Advance bookings have soared past USD 40 million, indicating a potential opening exceeding USD 250 million, a remarkable feat given limited IMAX availability.

articles.title: 'Nedumkandam Miracle': Mohanlal - Dileesh Pothan film
articles.description: Malayalam superstar Mohanlal has officially announced his highly anticipated collaboration with director Dileesh Pothan for a film titled 'Nedumkandam Miracle'. The project, which marks their first joint venture, was unveiled via a mysterious motion poster showcasing silhouettes of characters. With a strong creative team including Syam Pushkaran and Sushin Shyam, the film promises an exciting cinematic experience for fans.
